user.title: SOSSEN 4in1 2400W Microinverter
user.description:
Enter the connection details for your SOSSEN inverter.

⚠️ **The inverter must be producing solar energy** (it is completely off at night). After setup, allow 2-3 minutes before data starts appearing.

data.daytime_only: Daytime only (poll only when sun is up)

data_description.device_id: Smart Life app → Settings → Device Information → Device ID
data_description.local_key: From Tuya IoT Platform → Devices → Local Key
data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the inverter (minimum 5 seconds)
data_description.daytime_only: Disable polling at night to avoid connection errors (recommended for systems without battery)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the inverter. Check IP, Device ID and Local Key.
